S.FORM: Lavoy Allen (Hulam a sulit: ÊãâÊ≤É‰ºä¬∑ËâæÂÄ´) nalecuhan i Trenton, New Jersey. Lavoy Allen unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Lavoy Allen i 2011 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 50, namapili' tu nu Philadelphia 76ers putiput. 2 bulad 4 demiad, 1989 a mihca, Lavoy Allen, miunduay.
S.PHON: r~…æa*oj ar~…ær~…æ…ôn (ƒßur~…æam a sur~…æit: ******) nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i tr…ônton, n…ôw *…ôrs…ô. r~…æa*oj ar~…ær~…æ…ôn unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput. r~…æa*oj ar~…ær~…æ…ôn i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu pƒßir~…æad…ôr~…æpƒßia **…ôrs putiput. * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, r~…æa*oj ar~…ær~…æ…ôn, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Lavoy Allen (Hulam a sulit: ÊãâÊ≤É‰ºä¬∑ËâæÂÄ´) nalecuhan i Trenton, New Jersey. Lavoy Allen unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Lavoy Allen i 2011 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 50, namapili' tu nu Philadelphia 76ers putiput. 2 bulad 4 demiad, 1989 a mihca, Lavoy Allen, miunduay.
